description: Execute the reusable skill from trajectory workflow.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Execute the reusable trajectory capability: Execute the reusable skill from trajectory workflow.. Return JSON with result, evidence, and verifier.

context.description: Reviewed context pack and runtime facts.

task.description: Task to perform with the imported trajectory context.

evidence.description: Context-grounded evidence used by the Judge.

result.description: Structured result produced from the trajectory Skill.

verifier.description: Minimal verifier verdict, failure signal, or replay score for the result.

checked.description: Postconditions, constraints, paths, or evidence points checked.

failure_signal.description: Reason the verifier would reject the result.

passed.description: Whether the preview verifier accepts the result.

name: trajectory_execute

challenges.expected_evidence: A structured result plus references to the context facts or procedure steps.
challenges.failure_signal: Missing required input, ignored constraint, or output without supporting evidence.
rubric: Uses only information grounded in the imported context.
Returns structured evidence for the expected result.
Respects documented constraints and failure signals.
challenges.task: Use the trajectory context to complete the reusable operation.

examples: {"source_url":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/posgnu/rci-agent/main/prompt/enter-date/example.txt","task":"Enter 03/31/2015 as the date in the input box and click the submit button.","step":1,"observation":"A date input box is available with id tt. The submit button is available with id subbtn.","action":"clickxpath //*[@id=\"tt\"]","expected_observation":"The date input receives focus.","success_condition":"Focus is inside the date input before typing."}

{"source_url":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/posgnu/rci-agent/main/prompt/enter-date/example.txt","task":"Enter 03/31/2015 as the date in the input box and click the submit button.","step":2,"observation":"The cursor is in the date input; the task requires pressing left arrow exactly two times before typing.","action":"press arrowleft","expected_observation":"The cursor moves one position left.","success_condition":"First required left-arrow press is complete."}

{"source_url":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/posgnu/rci-agent/main/prompt/enter-date/example.txt","task":"Enter 03/31/2015 as the date in the input box and click the submit button.","step":3,"observation":"The cursor is still in the date input.","action":"press arrowleft","expected_observation":"The cursor moves a second position left.","success_condition":"Exactly two left-arrow presses have been performed."}

{"source_url":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/posgnu/rci-agent/main/prompt/enter-date/example.txt","task":"Enter 03/31/2015 as the date in the input box and click the submit button.","step":4,"observation":"The cursor is positioned for date entry.","action":"type 03/31/2015","expected_observation":"The input contains 03/31/2015.","success_condition":"The requested date appears in the input."}
